violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025
Numerous food were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen, walk in cooler, and basement storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

A cleaver is stored on an unclean surface (side of the prep unit along wall) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025
Water observed in blender. After cleaning and sanitizing, equipment and utensils must be air dried. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

Tapioca bubbles observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2023

The refrigerator used to store tapioca bubbles and soda was not in good repair, not holding food at 41 degrees F or below. Refrigerator must be adjusted or repaired. The refrigerator may not be used to store food requiring refrigeration until it is functioning properly. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2023
